name: Shaheb Bibi Joker
overview:
No one dares to stand against the monopoly of Saheb, now a terrible game is about to start in that arena!

Saheb, Bibi or Joker – Who will have the last laugh?

trailers.title: Shaheb Bibi Joker | Official Trailer | Arindam, Arunima, Arjun, Koushik, Chandan, Falaque | Fridaay
